projects.name: I-35 Interchange Strategy
projects.description: Regional I-35 corridor improvements: Exit 71 & 76 optimization, truck-friendly infrastructure, regional commerce gateway

projects.name: Highway 77 Corridor Improvements
projects.description: Agricultural spine: 4-lane conversion, passing lanes, truck infrastructure, safety improvements. Kansas City to Oklahoma border

projects.name: Highway 54 Corridor East-West Expansion
projects.description: East-west corridor: agricultural goods + tourism gateway. Emporia to Dodge City connectivity

projects.name: North Expansion Zone Development
projects.description: North Gateway residential + mixed-use: 150-200 housing units, hotel, commercial services. Workforce housing priority

projects.name: Lakeside Recreation District Development
projects.description: Hotel (100-150 rooms), RV park (80-100 sites), marina expansion, water sports hub. Regional tourism anchor

projects.name: South Downtown Revitalization (TIF District)
projects.description: Central Ave. renewal: 60-80 residential lofts, ground-floor retail, streetscape improvements. Historic adaptive reuse

projects.name: East El Dorado Connectivity
projects.description: Road/utility extensions connecting east side residential + industrial. Gateway to Prospect

projects.name: Butler Community College Expansion
projects.description: Enrollment growth support: new facilities, workforce programs (healthcare, tech, trades), regional satellite campuses

projects.name: Project Horizon: Data Center Campus
projects.description: 50+ MW-capable data center + tech campus. Fiber backbone, dedicated water supply, power infrastructure. Regional tech anchor

projects.name: Lake Activity Zones & Water Sports
projects.description: 5-zone lake management: Water Sports, Family Rec, Commercial Services, Conservation, Infrastructure. Interactive watersports programs
projects.nextMilestone: Zone signage + management plan launch — Q3 2026

projects.name: Regional Water Authority Integration
projects.description: El Dorado Lake water supply optimization for industrial + residential growth. Regional water contracts, infrastructure upgrades

projects.name: Fiber Broadband Network Expansion
projects.description: Gigabit fiber to all city + 5-mile rural radius. Federal BEAD grant funded. Tech workforce enabler
